_doc: D3 follow-up cadence config. Drives routing decisions in lib/d3-cadence.ts. Two regimes coexist: (a) active_eligible cadence — the parked-on-silence follow-up loop, ~30-day gaps, max 2 attempts, then dispose (Maverick rebuild-stale-deal-handling 2026-06-14, send via /api/cron/parked-followup, autonomous SMS, no paid data API in this loop); (b) pending_reverification status_check probe, unchanged. Templates referenced here live in scripts/outreach/ as DRAFT until Alex approval.

config.follow_up_schedule_days_note: Gap-based: time SINCE LAST SEND (not since initial contact). With auto_dead at 30, the parked-on-silence loop fires day 30 (first follow-up — 30d after initial Texted send), day 60 (second follow-up — 30d after the first), dispose day 90 (30d after the second). Maximum cost per parked lead: 2 SMS @ ~$0.01 each, plus a single Firecrawl liveness check before each text (no paid data API after the initial underwrite).
config.drift_threshold_pct_note: List_Price change vs stored List_Price-at-send. Drift down >10% → follow_up_drift_down template. Drift up >10% → hold + Manual Review banner. Within ±10% → standard follow_up_attempt_1/2.
config.auto_dead_no_status_check_reply_days_not: If status_check probe gets no reply within 3 days, record → Pipeline_Stage=dead, Outreach_Status=Dead.
config.auto_dead_no_followup_reply_days_note: If no reply within 30 days after follow_up_attempt_2 fires, record → Pipeline_Stage=dead, Outreach_Status=Dead. With follow_up_schedule_days=[30,30] this lands the disposal at day ~90 from initial contact — matches Maverick's '~30-day cadence, max 2 attempts, then dispose'.
config.manual_review_banner_drift_up: PRICE DRIFT UP — seller got aggressive, review before sending
config.recently_touched_window_days_note: Layer 1 depth-gate widening (5/15 Alex directive): if an agent's phone was touched within this window on a DIFFERENT listing — regardless of that other listing's current Outreach_Status — treat the current listing as a warm contact. Catches the case where the prior listing went Dead but the human agent still remembers our outreach. Matches the 30-day stale-records threshold from the bulk-dead policy.
